name: Star5
description: Five-point stars turning to a new angle on reseed.

code.style: --rule: ( --rot: @pick(0deg, 90deg, 180deg, 270deg); @random(${shapeFrequency}) { background: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); -webkit-clip-path: polygon(50% 2%, 61% 38%, 98% 38%, 68% 60%, 79% 96%, 50% 74%, 21% 96%, 32% 60%, 2% 38%, 39% 38%); clip-path: polygon(50% 2%, 61% 38%, 98% 38%, 68% 60%, 79% 96%, 50% 74%, 21% 96%, 32% 60%, 2% 38%, 39% 38%); -webkit-transform: rotate(@var(--rot)); transform: rotate(@var(--rot)); } -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
